title: lasianthus burmanicus
intro: Lasianthus burmanicus, a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, is also known as the Burmese tea bush or Burmese tea plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus burmanicus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the leaves and stems used to make tea, and the roots used to make a medicinal tonic.
